title: How to show when Project Team Member is not available?
excerpt: Hi there - what is the best way to show on the Board when a Team member is away (vacation or leave for example), so we know this person can’t be assigned to tasks? I’d like this to show on the Workload widget/view.  Than…

posts.author: shirleys (Shirley Shahinfar)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there - what is the best way to show on the Board when a Team member is away (vacation or leave for example), so we know this person can’t be assigned to tasks? I’d like this to show on the Workload widget/view. Thanks.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @shirleys, good question! I would recommend setting the person’s capacity to 0 for that week (or however long the period of time is that they will be away).

You can do this by going to the effort and capacity section of the workload widget settings and then selecting “edit capacity per person”.

image742×834 39.5 KB
